text: My research focuses on the ethics of self-defence, compensation, and punishment. My PhD project asked how (if at all) justifications of defensive harming are affected when the victims are partially responsible for being threatened, for instance, through provocation or risk-taking. More recently, I have started thinking about some of these questions related to interpersonal address, such as advising (prospective) victims on how to avoid wrongs or blaming victims for failing to avoid wrongs.
